abilities.description: Your grappler can on to nearby ships. When you take a minute or so to ready the grappler, roll +integrity or +wits. On a strong hit, the grappler can be thrown or fired. On a weak hit, preparations require extra time or focus; @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-1). On a miss, ropse tangle and you must @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.3782f1b3c8ca8b88]{Withstand Damage} (-1). If you make a move to attack a foe or overcome an obstacle by firing the grappler, take an automatic strong hit.

If you score a strong hit when readying the grappling hooks, you may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1) to prepare extra hooks. When you fire with extra hooks, take +2 momentum; if in a fight, also mark progress.
When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.3129f4caa4754caf]{Take Decisive Action} by firing the grappler, you may reroll one challenge die.
